headline: F-15 YEETED 💥🛩️ Over Iran, Pilot PARACHUTE-PARTIED 🪂😎 Rescue BBQ 🔥🚁
text:
US F-15E Strike Eagle 🦅💣 got ZAPPED ⚡🍆 by IRGC goons over western Iran 🌵🇮🇷 – CBS spilling the tea ☕👀 from anon officials! Pilot #1 scooped up 🛀 by SAR squad, but #2 crew peep still M.I.A. 🕵️‍♂️🚫! Rescue posse – Warthog hog A-10 🐗🔫 + duo helos 🚁🚁 – got LIT UP 🔥 under fire, Warthog pilot YEETED 🪂💨 over Persian Gulf 🏖️🌊 and fished out like chum bait 🐟🎣!

Helo heroes 🦸‍♂️🚁 that nabbed F-15 flyboy got PUMMELED 💥😵, crew wounded but landed safe 📍🩹 – all getting that med drip 💉🏥! Iran gov simping HARD 🤤: 'Capture Yanks ALIVE 🧟‍♂️🔗 priority!' with 10B tomans bounty 🤑💰 (~£50K) for snitchin' on the 'intruder' 👽🚪. Tasnim rag first dropped the jet-down deets 📱📰 – first US bird smoked by Persians since war POPPED OFF 5 weeks ago 💥🕐!

Trump 🍊🕶️ bragged Wed Iran's drones/missiles 'DECIMATED' 🧨💀 – but F-15 BBQ says HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔🤡! White House 🤐: 'POTUS briefed' – no cap. Israel IDF ✡️🛡️ PAUSED strikes in hot zone per CNN 👀, denied earlier Qeshm Island pilot plummet 🏝️🚫. Trump + Hegseth bros 👬 hypin' 'war WON' 🏆😤, vowing HARD STRIKES 🔨🇮🇷 next 2-3 weeks, but Iran proxies still YEETIN' rockets 🚀🌋 despite 12K+ US booms 🧨🏭 on ships, missiles, nuke labs!

Ceasefire chats? DEAD END 🚫🤝 – Tehran ghosts MAGA Don 🍊👻, WSJ confirms. 365 GI Joes injured 😩🩹, Pentagon stats droppin' truth bombs 💣📊 – MAGA base SWEATING 😰💦 over endless overseas Ls, polls HATING war vibes 📉😤! Pundits clownin': 'Why risk bros for morphin' goals? Nuke smash ➕ missile navy ➕ proxy neuter? 🤷‍♂️💸' Public YAWNS at Trump war flex 🥱🤑.

Not first L – Kuwait friendly fire FRIED 3 jets 🛩️💥🔥 (6 crew safe 🪂), KC-135 tanker CRASHED Iraq killing 6 😢✈️, no fire fault. HRANA cries 1.6K Iranian civs KAPUT 💀 including 244 kids 🧒😭 since kickoff. F-15E costs $100M 💰🤑 – low-fly beast 🐲📡 with radar eyes 👀🔭 for air/ground SLAY 🔪✈️. Social vids BBC-verified 📹✅: low jets/helo swarm Khuzestan 👀🌪️ – SAR confirmed! Iran wants live trophies � Tanked pilots 🏆🔒, but Uncle Sam rescuin' like boss mode 😎🦅 – war's gettin' THICC 🍑💥 with plot twists! 🚨😂
